performance comparison,real-time detection	RT-DETR
YOLO
RT-DETR outperforms YOLOs in both speed and accuracy for real-time object detection.

efficiency improvement,feature processing	Hybrid Encoder
Multi-Scale Features
The hybrid encoder efficiently processes multi-scale features by decoupling intra-scale interaction and cross-scale fusion.

performance enhancement,query initialization	Transformer
Uncertainty-Minimal Query Selection
Uncertainty-Minimal Query Selection improves the quality of initial queries in the Transformer decoder.
